column1: sum(case when uc.status=1  then 1 else 0 end )as CC_cadast
CASE WHEN d.Status =1 and d.orderid <>0 AND d.orderid = su.first_orderid then 1 else 0 END as flg_new
CASE WHEN d.Status =1 and d.orderid <>0 AND d.orderid <> su.first_orderid then 1 else 0 END as flg_repeat
CASE WHEN d.Status =1 and d.orderid = 0 then 1 else 0 end as flg_Wallet
inner join stat_users su on d.userid=su.userid
left join user_creditcards uc on (d.userid = uc.userid)
